label: Electronics & Technology
description: Industry archetype for consumer electronics, computing hardware, mobile devices, and electronic components. Includes product types for devices, accessories, and components with technical attributes for connectivity, power, display specifications, and regulatory compliance (FCC, CE, RoHS, WEEE).

attribute_groups.description: Core technical specifications: processor, memory, storage, and performance metrics
Display resolution, panel type, refresh rate, and audio specifications
Wireless, wired, and I/O connectivity options including WiFi, Bluetooth, USB, and ports
Power consumption, battery capacity, charging specifications, and energy ratings
Regulatory certifications, safety standards, and environmental compliance (FCC, CE, RoHS, WEEE)

attributes.description: Processor/chipset model (e.g., Apple M3, Intel Core i7-14700K, Snapdragon 8 Gen 3)

attributes.options: 1 GB, 2 GB, 4 GB, 6 GB, 8 GB, 12 GB, 16 GB, 32 GB, 64 GB, 128 GB, 256 GB
16 GB, 32 GB, 64 GB, 128 GB, 256 GB, 512 GB, 1 TB, 2 TB, 4 TB, 8 TB
attributes.description: Internal storage capacity (SSD, HDD, or flash storage)

attributes.options: SSD, NVMe SSD, HDD, eMMC, UFS, Hybrid (SSD + HDD)
Windows 11, Windows 10, macOS, iOS, Android, iPadOS, Chrome OS, Linux, None (Firmware)
IPS, OLED, AMOLED, TN, VA, Mini-LED, Micro-LED, E-Ink
Bluetooth 4.2, Bluetooth 5.0, Bluetooth 5.1, Bluetooth 5.2, Bluetooth 5.3, None

attributes.description: Available ports and connectors (e.g., 2x USB-C, 1x HDMI 2.1, 1x 3.5mm audio)
Charging specifications (e.g., 65W USB-C PD, Qi wireless charging)
Typical and max power consumption (e.g., 45W typical, 120W max)

attributes.options: A+++, A++, A+, A, B, C, D, E, F, G
Black, White, Silver, Space Grey, Gold, Blue, Red, Green, Purple, Rose Gold, Midnight, Starlight
attributes.description: Product color or finish for variant generation

attributes.options: FCC, CE, UL, RoHS, WEEE, Energy Star, Wi-Fi Certified, MFi, IP67, IP68, MIL-STD-810
attributes.description: Primary regulatory certification or safety standard

attributes.options: 6 Months, 1 Year, 2 Years, 3 Years, 5 Years, Limited Lifetime
None, IPX4 (Splash), IPX5 (Jet), IPX7 (Immersion), IPX8 (Submersion), IP67, IP68
attributes.description: Water and dust resistance rating per IEC 60529

attributes.options: Fingerprint (In-Display), Fingerprint (Side), Fingerprint (Rear), Face ID, Iris Scanner, None

product_types.description: Mobile phones and phablets. Supports Color/Storage variant axes with cellular and camera specifications.
Notebooks, ultrabooks, and 2-in-1 convertible laptops. Supports RAM/Storage/Color variant axes.
Tablets and e-readers. Supports Storage/Color/Connectivity variant axes.
Desktop computers, all-in-one PCs, and standalone monitors. Supports configuration-based variants.
Electronic accessories: chargers, cables, cases, screen protectors, and peripherals. Some support color variants.
Smartwatches, fitness trackers, and smart rings. Supports Color/Size variant axes.
Headphones, earbuds, speakers, and soundbars. Supports Color variant axes.

Fitness bands, activity trackers, and health monitors
Headphones, earbuds, speakers, and audio equipment
Over-ear headphones, in-ear earbuds, and wireless buds
Portable speakers, smart speakers, and soundbars
Electronic accessories: chargers, cables, cases, and peripherals
Phone cases, laptop sleeves, screen protectors, and protective accessories
Power adapters, charging cables, wireless chargers, and power banks

quality_rules.message: Computing devices must specify the processor or chipset
quality_rules.description: Processor is a key differentiator and purchase criterion for electronics

quality_rules.message: Electronic devices must specify storage capacity
quality_rules.description: Storage capacity is essential for customer decision-making and variant differentiation

quality_rules.rule_name: Screen Size Required for Display Devices
quality_rules.message: Devices with displays must specify the screen size
quality_rules.description: Screen size is a primary search and filter criterion in electronics

quality_rules.message: Portable devices should specify battery capacity
quality_rules.description: Battery life information helps customers compare mobile and portable devices

quality_rules.message: Products should list regulatory certifications (FCC, CE, etc.)
quality_rules.description: Regulatory certifications are required for legal sale in most markets

quality_rules.message: Specifying warranty period builds customer confidence
quality_rules.description: Warranty information is a key trust factor in electronics purchases

quality_rules.message: Connected devices should specify WiFi standard
quality_rules.description: WiFi standard helps customers assess network compatibility

quality_rules.message: Electronics products should have at least 3 images (front, back, ports/detail)
quality_rules.description: Multiple angles help customers evaluate build quality and connectivity options

quality_rules.message: Screen size must be a positive number
quality_rules.description: Zero or negative screen size values indicate data entry errors

demo_products.description: Lightweight 14-inch ultrabook with latest-gen processor, all-day battery life, and stunning OLED display. Perfect for professionals on the go.
Flagship smartphone with titanium frame, 200MP camera system, and S Pen support. Features a stunning Dynamic AMOLED display and all-day battery.
Premium wireless earbuds with adaptive noise cancellation, spatial audio, and up to 30 hours total battery life with charging case.
Advanced smartwatch with always-on AMOLED display, comprehensive health monitoring, and 5-day battery life.
Compact GaN USB-C charger with 65W Power Delivery. Compatible with laptops, tablets, and smartphones.
